query:
SELECT wc.lastStatus AS wcStatus, lm.status AS msgStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT m.sessionId, m.remoteJid, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId
  WHERE m.fromMe = 1
) lm ON wc.sessionId = lm.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = lm.remoteJid
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
GROUP BY wc.lastStatus, lm.status
ORDER BY cnt DESC

FROM wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT m.sessionId, m.remoteJid, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId
  WHERE m.fromMe = 1
) lm ON wc.sessionId = lm.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = lm.remoteJid
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
GROUP BY wc.lastStatus, lm.status
ORDER BY cnt DESC
